stopConditions: Split official tool tables/directories into one record per explicitly named tool.
Do not expand generic examples, research papers, or model-family mentions into current tool records.

methodsAttempted.query: QS 111-120 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official-page fetches were used across QS111-120. Tool-level evidence was found for Aalto, UC Davis, Helsinki, UCD, Leiden, Rice, Oslo, Waterloo, and Georgia Tech.

artifacts.summary: QS111-120 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for nine universities. Pontificia Universidad Catolica de Chile was not expanded because no official tool-level availability source was found in this pass.

artifacts.title: QS111-120 AI Tools Extraction
artifacts.summary: Validated tool-level AI tools extraction for QS111-120, with official source-backed records for Aalto, UC Davis, Helsinki, UCD, Leiden, Rice, Oslo, Waterloo, and Georgia Tech.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Records are tracker-derived summaries from public official sources and do not replace official university pages.
Schools without explicit tool-level official evidence were not expanded into named tool conclusions.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Aalto AI Assistant is listed for Aalto University in an official university AI tools source. Derived availability: allowed. Derived endorsement type: self hosted system.
artifacts.normalizedValue: {"tool":"self_deploy","rawToolName":"Aalto AI Assistant","description":"Aalto's own chat-based AI assistant for staff and students, built by Aalto IT Services and School of Science/RSE service.","howToObtain":"Visit ai.aalto.fi, choose login, and sign in with an Aalto user ID.","costToUser":"No direct user charge; Aalto asks users to monitor monthly usage against internal limits.","availability":"allowed","endorsementType":"self_hosted_system"}
